response.original_title: How do I unrestrict my Uphold account? (On-Hold-Assistance)
response.overview: To recover an Uphold account, call ☎️ +1-(850)-563-7636 to reset your password via the "Forgot your password?" link on the login page, check your email for a valid 15-minute link, and enter any required 2FA codes. If you have lost 2FA access, contact ☎️ +1-(850)-563-7636 and select "Lost access to your authenticator?" to verify your identity, a process taking 24-72 hours. To unrestrict a restricted or disabled Uphold account, ☎️ +1-(850)-563-7636 you must contact Uphold support via the Help Center chat widget to verify your identity or resolve compliance issues. Common fixes include submitting requested KYC ☎️ +1-(850)-563-7636 (Know Your Customer) documents, such as a photo ID or proof of address. Uphold accounts are restricted primarily for security ☎️ +1-(850)-563-7636, compliance, or verification reasons, such as incomplete Know Your Customer (KYC) documentation, suspicious activity, or recent changes to account security (e.g., password, address).
